product_overview: RE-SET is a combined public-facing website and practice management platform for a Turkish psychology/therapy practice, providing information, content (blog/podcast/YouTube), online appointment booking, client account access, and a comprehensive admin dashboard.
core_goals: Provide a clear, accessible public website that presents services, methods, blog, podcast and practitioner information.
Enable clients to register, book appointments online, and manage their profile and appointments in a protected client panel.
Offer the practitioner a secure admin dashboard to manage content, appointments, clients, finances, and site configuration.
Ensure legal and privacy compliance (KVKK/GDPR), multi-language support, and good performance/accessibility.

features.name: User Authentication
features.description: Email/password authentication flows (login, registration, password reset) using Supabase Auth; protects client and admin routes.
user_flows: Navigate to /login -> Fill email input field -> Fill password input field -> Click Login button to submit -> See client panel (/client-panel) after successful auth
Navigate to /login -> Fill email input field -> Fill password input field -> Click Login button to submit -> See 'Invalid credentials' error toast
Navigate to /register -> Fill registration form fields -> Click Register button -> See email verification sent confirmation
Navigate to /register -> Fill registration form fields with weak password -> Click Register button -> See 'Password too weak' validation error
Navigate to /reset-password -> Fill email input field -> Click Reset Password link -> See 'Password reset link sent' confirmation
Navigate to /reset-password -> Fill email input field with unregistered email -> Click Reset Password link -> See 'Email not found' error message

features.name: Homepage
features.description: Public landing page with hero CTA, services overview, reviews slider, navigation header and footer with legal links.
user_flows: Navigate to / -> Scroll through homepage sections -> View reviews slider -> Click navigation link to /booking -> Navigate to /booking -> See booking form
Navigate to / -> Scroll through homepage sections -> Click booking CTA button -> Navigate to /booking -> See booking form load error

features.name: Appointment Booking
features.description: Online appointment booking form that collects date, time and contact info and inserts bookings into the Supabase appointments table.
user_flows: Navigate to /booking -> Select appointment date -> Select appointment time -> Fill contact information -> Submit booking request -> See booking confirmation message
Navigate to /booking -> Select appointment date -> Select appointment time that is already booked -> Fill contact information -> Submit booking request -> See time slot unavailable error

features.name: Admin Dashboard
features.description: Protected admin panel (/admin) with tabs to manage content, appointments, blog, podcast, users, clients, accounting, ads and site config.
user_flows: Navigate to /admin -> Authenticate as admin -> Switch between admin tabs -> Switch to BlogTab -> Click create new blog post -> Fill post fields -> Click Save -> See new post appear in BlogTab
Navigate to /admin -> Not authenticated or not admin -> See access denied and redirect to /login or access denied message

features.name: Client Panel
features.description: Authenticated client area (/client-panel) where registered users can view upcoming appointments, profile info and edit settings.
user_flows: Navigate to /client-panel -> Authenticate -> View upcoming appointments -> Click Edit profile -> Fill profile fields -> Click Save -> See profile updated confirmation
Navigate to /client-panel -> Not authenticated -> Redirect to /login

features.name: Blog
features.description: Blog listing page (/blog) that lets visitors browse posts and read full articles fetched from Supabase.
user_flows: Navigate to /blog -> Browse blog posts -> Click to read full article -> See full article content
Navigate to /blog -> Click to read full article for a deleted/removed post -> See 404 Not Found page or 'Article not found' error

features.name: Contact Form
features.description: Public contact form (/contact) capturing name, email and message and storing submissions in Supabase messages table.
user_flows: Navigate to /contact -> Fill name field -> Fill email field -> Fill message textarea -> Submit contact form -> See submission success confirmation
Navigate to /contact -> Fill name field -> Leave email field empty -> Fill message textarea -> Submit contact form -> See email required validation error

features.name: Cookie Consent Banner
features.description: GDPR/KVKK compliant cookie consent banner shown on first visit with accept/reject options and link to the cookie policy page.
user_flows: Navigate to / -> View cookie banner on first visit -> Click Accept -> See banner dismissed and preference saved
Navigate to / -> View cookie banner on first visit -> Click Accept -> See 'Failed to save preferences' error toast

features.name: Internationalization (i18n)
features.description: Multi-language support via i18next with language switching and browser language detection.
user_flows: Navigate to / -> Switch language -> UI updates to selected language strings
Navigate to / -> Switch language -> See missing translations fallback to default language or fallback text

features.name: Legal & Static Pages
features.description: Static legal and informational pages (About, Methods, KVKK, Privacy, Copyright, Cookies, Podcast, YouTube) accessible from site navigation.
user_flows: Navigate to /about -> Read practitioner biography and credentials
Navigate to /methods -> Browse therapy methods -> Click method item to read details
Navigate to /kvkk -> Read KVKK disclosure -> Navigate to /privacy via footer link -> Read privacy policy

routes.description: Homepage with hero section, services overview and reviews
KVKK (Turkish data protection law) disclosure page
User login page with email/password authentication
Admin dashboard with tabs for managing content, users, appointments, blog, podcast, accounting
Client panel for registered users to view their appointments and profile

features.name: User Authentication
features.description: Login, register, and password reset with email/password via Supabase Auth
user_interactions: Click Register link to navigate to registration

features.name: Homepage
features.description: Landing page with hero section, services overview, and client reviews slider

features.name: Admin Dashboard
features.description: Comprehensive admin panel with tabs for managing all site content
user_interactions: View user accounts and pending registrations

features.name: Client Panel
features.description: Authenticated client area for viewing appointments and profile

features.name: Cookie Consent Banner
user_interactions: View cookie banner on first visit
